## utm-dev android logs

Stream Android logs for Gio apps (Ctrl+C to stop)

### Synopsis

Stream filtered logcat output showing only Gio/Go-related log messages.
Use --all to show all device logs instead of just Gio-filtered ones.

```
utm-dev android logs [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --all    Show all device logs (not just Gio-filtered)
  -h, --help   help for logs
```

* [utm-dev android](utm-dev_android.md)	 - Android device and emulator management
